title: Neko Language Sodium Pack
description: This resource pack is belong to Neko Language Pack(NLP), Many Sodium like mods translation was included in this pack.
body:
This resource pack is belong to Neko Language Pack(NLP) as a subpack, Many Sodium like mods translation was included in this pack.
这个材质包作为附属包属于NLP项目的一部分,有许多像Sodium一样的模组翻译被包含在了该包内

翻译Translations:
- zh_cn (Chinese, 简体中文)

模组Mods:
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)
- [Chloride](https://modrinth.com/mod/chloride)
